parameters.emailMessage/Body:
Dear San

The following MoM Action Item is overdue and requires your attention.

Meeting Name @{items('Apply_to_each')?['MeetingName']}
Action Item @{items('Apply_to_each')?['ActionItem']}
Responsible @{items('Apply_to_each')?['ResponsiblePerson']}
Target Date @{formatDateTime(addDays('1899-12-30', int(items('Apply_to_each')?['TargetDate'])), 'dd-MMM-yyyy')}
Days Overdue @{if( greater(outputs('Compose_daysPastDue'),0), concat('Overdue by ', string(outputs('Compose_daysPastDue')), ' day(s)'), if( equals(outputs('Compose_daysPastDue'),0), 'Due today', concat('Due in ', string(mul(outputs('Compose_daysPastDue'), -1)), ' day(s)') ) ) }

Please take the necessary action at the earliest.

Regards,
PMO
UNO Minda

Dear San,

This is a reminder for the following MoM Action Item:

Meeting Name @{items('Apply_to_each')?['MeetingName']}
Action Item @{items('Apply_to_each')?['ActionItem']}
Responsible Person @{items('Apply_to_each')?['ResponsiblePerson']}
Target Date @{formatDateTime(addDays('1899-12-30', int(items('Apply_to_each')?['TargetDate'])), 'dd-MMM-yyyy')}
Due Status @{if( greater(outputs('Compose_daysPastDue'),0), concat('Overdue by ', string(outputs('Compose_daysPastDue')), ' day(s)'), if( equals(outputs('Compose_daysPastDue'),0), 'Due today', concat('Due in ', string(mul(outputs('Compose_daysPastDue'), -1)), ' day(s)') ) ) }

Please ensure that the action item is completed and the status is updated accordingly.

Regards,
PMO
UNO Minda

Compose_LastReminderSent_Parsed.description: This compose’s only job is to safely convert the “LastReminderSent” value from Excel into a proper date/time that Power Automate can work with.

Compose_DaysSinceLastReminder.description: This compose calculates how many days have passed since the last reminder email was sent.
